ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the product in mils */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product */,
  "dimensions_w" REAL /* Width dimension of the product in inches */,
  "dimensions_h" REAL /* Height dimension of the product in inches */,
  "dimensions_d" REAL /* Depth dimension of the product in inches */,
  "volume_fl_oz" REAL /* Volume of the product in fluid ounces */,
  "volume_ml" REAL /* Volume of the product in milliliters */,
  "volume_gal" REAL /* Volume of the product in gallons */,
  "quantity_per_case" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product per case */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was produced */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "quality_assurance_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has passed quality assurance */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_range" TEXT /* Range of order quantities (e.g., 1-4 cases) */,
  "price_per_case" REAL /* Price per case for the specified quantity range */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing became effective */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Additional discount percentage */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, phone, sales representative) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_case" REAL /* Price per case for the product at the time of order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the product in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer started doing business with the company */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view order) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
